results.title: Challenger CGF: Why Is It Back in the Retirement Income Debate?
results.description: Challenger stays in focus as annuity demand, rates and longevity planning shape Australia’s retirement income debate.

results.title: Nuvoco Vistas shares surge 8% on robust Q1 results, expansion plans
results.description: Profitability also strengthened during the quarter, with Nuvoco Vistas EBITDA per tonne rising by ₹90 compared with the previous quarter, driven by continued cost optimisation initiatives and operational efficiencies.
